title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Apollo Telehealth Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
